[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011011110 6
1 100110011 5
2 100000000 1
3 000001111 4
4 101110100 5
5 100011101 5
6 011001110 5
7 000001111 4

01 10 000001110 3
12 21 000000000 a
23 32 000000000 a
34 43 000011100 3
45 54 000001100 2
56 65 000001110 3
67 76 000001010 2
70 07 000101010 3

02 20 000000000 a
13 31 011001110 5 match 6
24 42 000000000 a
35 53 011001110 5 match 6
46 64 000001101 3
57 75 010001010 3
60 06 000001110 3
71 17 110001010 4

03 30 000001110 3
14 41 100001100 3
25 52 000000000 a
36 63 000001110 3
47 74 100001000 2
50 05 000001110 3
61 16 000001110 3
72 27 000000000 a

04 40 000001100 2
15 51 011001110 5 match 6
26 62 000000000 a
37 73 010001010 3
